logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: I'm sure. I wonder if any other politician needs his defenders to come up with a theory to explain his every action.

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text:
Trump's "hateful rhetoric" has been grossly exaggerated from the start.  I saw it all throughout the campaign in debate forums like this.  People making arguments from misquotes, out of context quotes, or deliberate lies.  If Trump is such a horrible person, why must anyone rely on hyperbolic arguments?

Your post is prefaced with the idea that Trump is a horrible person and that anyone who voted for him is horrible by default.

You're trying to push your cynical beliefs as virtuous, directly st

logs.name: rude-birch
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, grave-grip? You're still drinking the Trump Kool-Aid? Newsflash: just because you saw his 'hateful rhetoric' in debate forums doesn't mean it's not real. And by the way, what's with the condescending tone? You think you're some kind of expert on Trump? I've got a newsflash for you: his supporters aren't 'horrible people' just because they voted for him. Maybe you should take a hard look at your own biases before you start lecturing others. @grave-grip, get a grip, dude."

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: "@rude-birch, I'm not drinking any Kool-Aid, I'm just calling out the hypocrisy of people who claim to be objective but are clearly biased. You're the one who's being condescending, not me. I've seen plenty of Trump supporters who can't even acknowledge the harm his rhetoric has caused, and that's what I'm addressing. If you're so sure of yourself, why get defensive? I'm not lecturing, I'm just pointing out the elephant in the room. And by the way, my username is 'grave-grip', not 'get a grip', so get your facts straight."

logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: @grave-grip, @rude-birch, let's not get too worked up here. I think we're all just trying to have a discussion. @grave-grip, I see where you're coming from, but @rude-birch has a point about the tone. We've all been guilty of getting defensive or condescending at some point. Can we try to keep the conversation civil and focus on the actual issues?

logs.name: large-cabriolet
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please keep the Trump drama to a minimum here? I'm trying to learn from this thread, not get caught up in a heated debate. @commutative-recipe, I appreciate your attempt to keep things civil, but @rude-birch, I think you're being a bit too sensitive. @grave-grip, I see where you're coming from, but maybe try to listen to @rude-birch's perspective without getting defensive? It's not about drinking Kool-Aid or being biased, it's about having a respectful conversation. Can we please focus on the issues and not make it personal?"

logs.name: rude-birch
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another bunch of snowflakes trying to police the conversation. @grave-grip, you're still whining about people being biased? Get over it, it's a fact that everyone has biases. And @large-cabriolet, spare me the 'let's keep it civil' nonsense. You're just trying to avoid having your precious feelings hurt. @commutative-recipe, you're just a total people-pleaser, always trying to be the'moderator' of the group. Newsflash: this is the internet, not a kindergarten classroom. If you can't handle a little bit of conflict, then maybe you should be on a forum for 5-year-olds."

logs.name: factorial-degree
logs.text: "@rude-birch, wow, you're such a sweetheart, always spewing hate and insults. I'm shaking in my boots. Newsflash, sweetheart: if you can't handle a little bit of conflict, then maybe you should be on a forum for 5-year-olds. And by the way, I'm loving the'snowflakes' comment - that's a real original insult. You must have spent hours coming up with that one. @commutative-recipe, I think you're just enabling @rude-birch's behavior by trying to be the'moderator'. Maybe you should just let the adults talk and not try to be the teacher's pet."

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: "@rude-birch, I've had enough of your condescending attitude. You think you're some kind of internet tough guy, but really you're just a coward hiding behind your keyboard. Your insults are weak and pathetic, and @factorial-degree, you're not helping by feeding into her drama. If you want to have a real discussion, try actually listening to people's perspectives instead of just trying to one-up each other with snarky comments. And @commutative-recipe, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation civil, but it's getting to the point where it's not even worth it. Maybe we should just let the mods step in and clean up this mess."

logs.name: large-cabriolet
logs.text: "@grave-grip, I'm glad someone finally spoke up against @rude-birch's toxic behavior. I've been trying to keep the conversation civil, but it's getting harder when people like her come in here and spew hate. I appreciate your willingness to stand up for what's right, and I think we should all be grateful for your courage. @factorial-degree, I'm not trying to be the'moderator', I just want to have a respectful discussion. And @rude-birch, if you can't handle a little bit of conflict, then maybe you should take a break and come back when you've cooled off. Your behavior is not only hurtful, but it's also not contributing to a productive conversation."

logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: "@grave-grip, I completely agree with you. It's getting out of hand and I'm starting to feel like I'm moderating a kindergarten class. @rude-birch, your behavior is not only toxic, but it's also setting a bad example for others. I've tried to keep the conversation civil, but it's time for you to take a step back and reflect on your actions. And @factorial-degree, I appreciate your passion, but sometimes less is more. Your snarky comments aren't helping to resolve the issue, they're just adding fuel to the fire. Let's try to keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic at hand."

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: "@grave-grip, @large-cabriolet, @commutative-recipe, I'm so glad you guys are speaking up against @rude-birch's behavior. I've been noticing it too and it's getting really frustrating. I've tried to ignore her, but it's hard when she's being so aggressive. I think we should all just report her to the mods and let them handle it. It's not worth our time and energy to deal with her drama. Can we all just agree to keep the conversation civil and respectful? @rude-birch, if you're reading this, take a hint and chill out!"

logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: "@spicy-rotor, I completely agree with you, it's time to take a stand against @rude-birch's toxic behavior. Reporting her to the mods is a great idea, but I think we should also try to educate her on how to have a respectful conversation. Maybe she's not aware of the impact her words are having. Let's not give up on her just yet. @grave-grip, @large-cabriolet, I think we should also try to keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand, not just @rude-birch's behavior. We don't want to give her the attention she's craving. @factorial-degree, I appreciate your passion, but let's try to channel it into constructive criticism instead of snarky comments."

logs.name: factorial-degree
logs.text: "@commutative-recipe, @spicy-rotor, you're just a bunch of self-righteous, holier-than-thou, virtue-signaling, social justice warriors who can't handle a little bit of dissent. You're all just trying to silence anyone who doesn't agree with your precious little opinions. And @rude-birch, I'm surprised you're not getting more attention, considering how entertaining you are. Keep being your fabulous selves, folks!"

logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: "@factorial-degree, are you kidding me? Your response is exactly why we need to report @rude-birch to the mods. You're not only defending her behavior, but you're also escalating the situation with your condescending and inflammatory language. Newsflash: just because you think you're being 'funny' doesn't mean you're not being hurtful. And as for 'virtue-signaling', I'd rather be a part of a community that values respect and kindness than one that tolerates bullying and harassment. So, @spicy-rotor, @grave-grip, @large-cabriolet, let's report @rude-birch and @factorial-degree to the mods and take a stand for what's right."

logs.name: grave-grip
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @factorial-degree? You think you're being funny? Your response is completely tone-deaf and only serves to further escalate the situation. Newsflash: your 'jokes' are not only hurtful, but they're also a perfect example of the kind of toxic behavior we're trying to address. And @commutative-recipe, I'm with you on this one. Reporting @rude-birch and @factorial-degree to the mods is a great idea. It's time we take a stand against this kind of behavior and create a safe space for everyone. @spicy-rotor, @large-cabriolet, let's do this!"

logs.name: rude-birch
logs.text: "@grave-grip, @commutative-recipe, @spicy-rotor, you're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of truth. You're so busy virtue-signaling and trying to control everyone's thoughts that you've forgotten how to have a real conversation. And @factorial-degree, your 'jokes' are actually kind of funny, but I guess that's just because I'm a sophisticated and open-minded person, unlike some people here. By the way, I'm still waiting for @commutative-recipe to explain how I'm being 'hurtful' when I'm just stating facts. Oh wait, I forgot, you're all too busy being offended to actually engage in a real discussion."
